steps.title: Group the like terms
steps.content:
Write the sum and group terms with the same power of $x$:
$$(4x^4+3x^3)+(5x^4+6x^3)$$
$$(4x^4+5x^4)+(3x^3+6x^3)$$

steps.title: Add the coefficients
steps.content:
Only the coefficients of like terms are added:
$$(4+5)x^4+(3+6)x^3$$
$$9x^4+9x^3$$
The answer is D.
